ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the entity is located */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes about the entity */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating assigned to the entity (if any) */,
  "entity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the entity was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_entity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_type_id") REFERENCES entity_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the industry */,
  "sub_industry" TEXT /* Sub-industry of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the entity is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the entity is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the entity is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the entity is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_industry" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "primary_industry" INTEGER /* Whether the industry is primary for the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_location" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "primary_location" INTEGER /* Whether the location is primary for the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_type_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity type */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the entity type became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the entity type ended (if applicable) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the history entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_type_history_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_type_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_type_history_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES entity_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_type_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "entity_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first entity in the relationship */,
  "entity_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second entity in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, subsidiary, partner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_relationships_entity_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id2") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_relationships_entity_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id1") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)
